commands.review_summary:
The branch replaces append-layer transcript redaction with a shared config-aware redactor, returns and emits redacted transcript messages, adds focused regression tests, and updates changelog/API baseline metadata.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main writes transcripts through appendSessionTranscriptMessage with redactSecrets, while the PR demonstrates the remaining config-aware return/event path and test coverage. I did not execute tests during this read-only review.
